fields.description: The workbook (BOQs) this amount formula belongs to. Denormalized (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing) so the layer is filterable by BoQ.
fields.label: BoQ

fields.description: The committed sheet name, stored VERBATIM (#152 -- never stripped/trimmed). Part of the durable column identity (survives a re-commit).
fields.label: Sheet Name

fields.description: The committed-tier commit_version this formula belongs to (BoQ Sheet / BOQ Nodes / grid share one commit_version per (boq, sheet)). A formula is anchored to a committed version; identity component.
fields.label: Committed Version

fields.description: The TARGET amount column's value_field -- one of the amount fields: amount_by_area (per-area) / amount_total / amount_supply / amount_install (scalar). Identity component. Validated AMOUNT-only by the write path (a rate/qty target is rejected).
fields.label: Target Value Field

fields.description: The TARGET column's area slot -- and the DEFAULT-vs-OVERRIDE discriminator (no extra field). NULL = the logical-column DEFAULT (area-wildcard) for a per-area amount column, OR 'scalar' (no area dimension) for a scalar amount column. A CONCRETE area string = a PER-AREA OVERRIDE that wins for that one area. Identity component.
fields.label: Target Value Key (area / NULL=default-or-scalar)

fields.description: The TARGET amount column's inner kind for a per-area amount (total / supply / install); NULL for a scalar amount column. Identity component.
fields.label: Target Rate Subkey (amount kind)

fields.description: The TARGET amount column's Excel letter at definition time -- a convenience / re-resolve GUARD (letters can move on re-commit). NOT part of the unique key (mirrors BoQ Cell Pricing.node).
fields.label: Target Column Letter (guard)

fields.description: A copy of the target column's description / header at definition time -- a copy-forward MATCH GUARD. NOT part of the unique key.
fields.label: Description (guard)

fields.description: The token-tree formula JSON (stored verbatim; STRUCTURALLY validated at save, NOT evaluated here -- evaluation is F2). A node is EITHER an operator {op: '+'|'*', operands: [<node>, ...]} OR a leaf {ref: {value_field, value_key, rate_subkey}}. NO literal node (numeric literals are barred). Operand refs are first-class structured leaves so F2 can build the dependency graph without parsing. For a DEFAULT (area-wildcard) formula an area-bound operand leaf carries value_key=NULL ('bind to the current area').
fields.label: Formula (token-tree JSON)

fields.description: Per-identity formula version. Incremented on re-save by the write path (freeze-and-supersede, mirroring the committed tier + BoQ Cell Pricing).
fields.label: Formula Version

fields.description: Exactly one current formula record per identity (boq, sheet_name, committed_version, target_value_field, target_value_key, target_rate_subkey). The one-current invariant is enforced by the write path (pricing.py), NOT in this controller.
fields.label: Is Current

fields.description: When this formula record was written. Set by the write path.
fields.label: Defined At

fields.description: The finalize lock for this committed version. When set, the formula for this column is finalized (a later finalize slice enforces the lock semantics; this slice only declares the marker).
fields.label: Is Finalized
